name: io.github.polygraphso/litmus
description: Grade MCP servers A–F with the open behavioral litmus: reproducible, content-addressed evidence.

environmentVariables.name: POLYGRAPH_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL for published-grade lookups (check_server, list_servers, request_grade) and attestation resolution.

environmentVariables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_POLYGRAPH_NETWORK
environmentVariables.description: Which network to read attestations from: 'base' (mainnet, default) or 'base-sepolia' (testnet).
